**Findings**

No blocking issues found.

**Acceptance Criteria**

REQ-08 is met. [config.rs](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/.claude/worktrees/agent-8b293a0b/crates/jit/src/config.rs:835) adds `InvariantProjectionConfig::style`, defaulting through [style()](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/.claude/worktrees/agent-8b293a0b/crates/jit/src/config.rs:948) to `ProjectionStyle::Full`. [projection.rs](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/.claude/worktrees/agent-8b293a0b/crates/jit/src/validation/projection.rs:143) threads the style into rendering, and [projection.rs](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/.claude/worktrees/agent-8b293a0b/crates/jit/src/validation/projection.rs:184) implements `id-anchor` as `- **{id}** — {statement}` with no kind or enforced-by.

Repo configuration is set to `style = "id-anchor"` in [.jit/config.toml](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/.claude/worktrees/agent-8b293a0b/.jit/config.toml:148). [CLAUDE.md](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/.claude/worktrees/agent-8b293a0b/CLAUDE.md:123) restores the hand-authored `### Domain Invariants` heading, with markers wrapping only the id-anchor bullet list.

**Architecture**

Separation of concerns is preserved. Config parsing stays in `config.rs`; pure rendering and region splicing stay in `validation/projection.rs`; persistence goes through `IssueStore::read_repo_file` and `IssueStore::write_repo_file` at [projection.rs](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/.claude/worktrees/agent-8b293a0b/crates/jit/src/validation/projection.rs:316) and [projection.rs](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/.claude/worktrees/agent-8b293a0b/crates/jit/src/validation/projection.rs:337). No direct file I/O was added outside storage.

**Functional Paradigm**

The new style renderer uses iterator mapping and collection at [projection.rs](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/.claude/worktrees/agent-8b293a0b/crates/jit/src/validation/projection.rs:188). Existing imperative string assembly remains only in the pre-existing full renderer and is appropriate for deterministic formatting.

**Correctness And Invariants**

Atomic writes remain behind `write_repo_file`, which uses storage’s atomic writer. The change does not modify issue state transitions, event logging behavior, assignee/label validation, gate semantics, or PID handling. No new PID or process-signal code was introduced.

**Safety**

`#![deny(unsafe_code)]` remains enforced in the Rust crates. No unsafe code was introduced.

**Testing**

I did not rerun cargo tests because the issue has a passed `cargo-ci` gate. The recorded gate run for commit `d8ff3067224410bda30e2309db5557279fdec171` passed: fmt ok, clippy ok, tests `2746 passed, 0 failed, 12 ignored`.

New unit coverage exists for default-full behavior and id-anchor rendering at [projection.rs](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/.claude/worktrees/agent-8b293a0b/crates/jit/src/validation/projection.rs:394) and [projection.rs](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/.claude/worktrees/agent-8b293a0b/crates/jit/src/validation/projection.rs:407).

**Error Handling**

No new unwraps/expect calls were added in library code outside tests. Config invalid values are typed through serde enum parsing for `ProjectionStyle`; projection errors remain `thiserror`-based and contextual.

**CLI Contract**

`jit invariant render --json` already exists and continues to route through `CommandExecutor::render_invariants`, which uses the configured projection style via `project_invariants`.

**Documentation**

Public config/render surfaces added or changed include doc comments and `# Examples`, including `InvariantProjectionConfig::style` and `ProjectionStyle`.

**Prior Review Feedback**

`run_history` is empty, so there are no prior review findings to verify.

**Jit Issue Management**

The dependency `96f0c39f` is marked done in the supplied issue context. `./scripts/jit-validate.sh` passed locally with `✓ Repository validation passed`.

VERDICT: PASS
